# Varsilias

Varsilias is the open source documentation home for infrastructure tools built by Daniel Okoronkwo.

## Primary links

- Site: https://www.varsilias.dev
- Blog: https://danielokoronkwo.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/Varsilias
- Sitemap: https://www.varsilias.dev/sitemap.xml

## Projects

- Corelens: stable Node.js observability instrumentation for portable traces and metrics.
- Concile: experimental reconciliation engine for event-driven financial systems built with Golang.
- Varsilias.dev: documentation and contribution guide for the open source docs platform.

## Useful docs

- Corelens overview: https://www.varsilias.dev/corelens/overview
- Corelens quickstart: https://www.varsilias.dev/corelens/quickstart
- Concile overview: https://www.varsilias.dev/concile/overview
- Varsilias.dev contributing: https://www.varsilias.dev/varsilias-dev/contributing
- Analytics and SEO setup: https://www.varsilias.dev/varsilias-dev/analytics-seo
